Package i5.cb.telos.object

Class TelosObject

  • java.lang.Object
    • i5.cb.telos.object.TelosObject
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    Individual, TelosLink

    public abstract class TelosObject
extends java.lang.Object
implements java.io.Serializable
    Telos object, also known as Proposition.
    TelosObjects are immutable. They don't contain context information about incoming / outgoing links, so they may be contained in more than one object set.
    Because of immutability, it is possible to share TelosObject instances within a JVM. Thus we can implement the equality relation based on the object ids, which are regular Java object references in our case. This makes equality tests and hash table lookups as fast as possible. Note that we don't have to redefine equals() or hashCode() here, as we inherit the implementation from Object.
    TelosObject is an abstract class. It has four subclasses: Individual, Instantiation, Specialization and Attribute. The latter three are derived from TelosLink.
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Method Detail

      • getSystemClass

        public abstract int getSystemClass​()
        Returns:
        this object's system class, as an int value

      • getSystemClassName

        public abstract java.lang.String getSystemClassName​()
        Returns:
        this object's system class' name

      • isIndividual

        public final boolean isIndividual​()
        Returns:
        is this object an individual ("node") object?

      • isLink

        public final boolean isLink​()
        Returns:
        is this object a link (as opposed to an individual object)?

      • isInstantiation

        public final boolean isInstantiation​()
        Returns:
        is this object an instantiation?

      • isSpecialization

        public final boolean isSpecialization​()
        Returns:
        is this object a specialization?

      • isAttribute

        public final boolean isAttribute​()
        Returns:
        is this object an attribute?

      • isSystemClass

        public final boolean isSystemClass​()
        Returns:
        is this object one of the four system classes?

      • getSource

        public abstract TelosObject getSource​()
        Returns:
        this object's source

      • getLabel

        public abstract java.lang.String getLabel​()
        Returns:
        this object's label

      • getDestination

        public abstract TelosObject getDestination​()
        Returns:
        this object's destination. Might be null for attributes.
        See Also:
        Transform.toTelosObject(i5.cb.telos.frame.ObjectName, i5.cb.telos.object.ITelosObjectSet)

      • getOID

        public java.lang.String getOID​(boolean bLong)
        Parameters:
        bLong - long OID format? The long format includes the class name.
        Returns:
        String representation of this object's OID, which correspond to the object's reference (=address or handle) in this JVM. That is, our OIDs are unique in one JVM.

      • getOID

        public final java.lang.String getOID​()
        Returns:
        String representation of this object's OID, short format.

      • asProposition

        public java.lang.String asProposition​(boolean bLongOID)
        Parameters:
        bLongOID - long OID format?
        Returns:
        Proposition representation: P(id,src,label,dest)

      • asProposition

        public final java.lang.String asProposition​()
        Returns:
        Proposition representation: P(id,src,label,dest). Short OID format.

      • toString

        public java.lang.String toString​()
        Overrides:
        toString in class java.lang.Object
        Returns:
        the full object name of the object as string

      • getIndividual

        public static Individual getIndividual​(java.lang.String sLabel)
        Returns:
        the individual with the given label, if there is one. a freshly created individual, otherwise.

        public static Instantiation getInstantiation​(TelosObject source,
                                             TelosObject destination)

                                     java.lang.String sLabel,
                                     TelosObject destination)
        Parameters:
        destination - is needed here. May be null.
        See Also:
        Transform.toTelosObject(i5.cb.telos.frame.ObjectName, i5.cb.telos.object.ITelosObjectSet)

      • getKey

        protected static final java.lang.String getKey​(TelosObject source,
                                               java.lang.String sLabel,
                                               TelosObject destination)
        Parameters:
        destination - may be null for attributes.
        Returns:
        a unique key used to identify TelosObjects
        See Also:
        Transform.toTelosObject(i5.cb.telos.frame.ObjectName, i5.cb.telos.object.ITelosObjectSet)

      • getAllTelosObjects
